Brand.name: CHEEROK
Brand.tagline: A literary magazine of fiction, essays & podcast

Home.newsletterSub: Receive the latest stories, conversations, and podcasts from Cheerok in your inbox each week.

Archive.title: Archive
Archive.sub: Browse the complete Cheerok archive of fiction, essays, podcasts, and interviews.

About.title: About Cheerok
About.intro: Cheerok is an independent magazine for short fiction, essays, interviews, and podcast.
About.mission: Cheerok began with a simple idea: a magazine that respects its reader. Not through noise, not through tempting headlines — but through work worth the time it takes to read.
About.p1d: Persian short fiction from new and established voices.
About.p2d: Personal, thoughtful writing on life, the city, and literature.
About.p3d: Audio conversations on writing, reading, and living with words.
About.p4d: Long-form conversations with writers, translators, and publishers.
About.ctaSub: Cheerok is always looking for new voices in fiction, essays, and conversation.

Submit.title: Submit Your Work
Submit.intro: Cheerok publishes Persian short fiction and essays. If you have a piece you think belongs here, we'd be glad to read it.
Submit.g3v: A token honorarium for accepted work
Submit.name: Name
Submit.fileDrop: Drag and drop your file, or click to browse
Submit.coverHint: Optional — anything the editor should know.
Submit.successSub: Thank you for choosing Cheerok as a home for your work.
